context_notes: Completed 3 phases of v2.0 Agent BI transformation: insight engine (auto-pattern discovery with 7 detection types), report engine (3 templates, 3 formats), semantic layer (auto-infer from DB schema). Core architecture is in place. Next phases build on these foundations — context manager needs semantic model for reference resolution, forecast engine needs insight engine's trend detection, attribution engine needs both.
